description: Per-logtype SOC-analyst view: Baseline (B*) and Enriched (E*) sub-sections derived from the ITSF PredefinedReports.xml inventory (V6/data/spec_to_itsf_join.json). Each row records the section id, human-readable name, tab placement, the ITSF report_count + group_count that fed it, and the top contributing group_names. always_on=true rows come from spec section 4.x and have report_count=0.

Syslog.override_note: Generic syslog rendered with the network-device panel shape; sections will populate as vendor-specific log types are parsed downstream.

m365_mailtrace.override_note: Message-trace records — not in current ITSF M365 report tree.

PMP.override_note: PasswordManager Pro — report definitions live in PMP product, not ITSF reports xml.

IBM_Maximo.override_note: Maximo asset-management audit — needs separate source.

SyslogApp.override_note: Generic syslog wrapper — pass-through with no reports of its own.

Gateway_Server.override_note: CASB / cloud gateway wrapper — no first-party report tree.

audit.override_note: Log360 self-audit (platform metadata) — no first-party report tree.

alerts.override_note: Internal alert-metadata feed — no first-party report tree.
